verse_text: Hear the word of the Lord, You children of Israel, For the Lord has a judgment for the inhabitants of the land: 'There is no truth or mercy Or knowledge of God in the land.

pericope.title: Israel Will Return to the Lord

links.context: Elsewhere, Hosea describes the fundamental human problem as lack of knowledge of God ([[HOS.4:1]], [[HOS.4:6]]; 6:6). This ignorance unfortunately is self-inflicted because men suppress the truth about God ([[ROM.1:18]]-32).

To "play the harlot" or take a concubine was an expression typically used to paint a prophetic picture of people following false gods, often Baal, whose followers often became involved in extreme sexual misconduct ([[HOS.4:1]]-6; [[JER.3:1]], [[JER.3:8]]; [[EZK.16:41]]; 23:44).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
